com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer

Class DataHubItemWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer.MarkLogicItemWriter
      • com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer.DataHubItemWriter

    org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStream, org.springframework.batch.item.ItemWriter<com.marklogic.client.document.DocumentWriteOperation>

extends MarkLogicItemWriter
